name: GoFaxYourself audio assets
note: Audio is generated LOCALLY and is NOT shipped in this repo (see .gitignore: audio/**/*.wav). GoFaxYourself ships text scripts, not voices. The MIT LICENSE covers code and text scripts, NOT audio. Any audio you publish must have clear redistribution rights. See docs/AUDIO_GENERATION.md.

local_generation.redistribution: no (personal use only — Apple system voices are not redistributable)
local_generation.note: All 48 packs (8 personas x 6 languages) were synthesized offline with macOS 'say'. They play fine on your own SIP line but must not be committed or published. For redistributable audio, use espeak via tools/generate-audio.sh and verify its license.
